data.description:
# Generalize the example skills: rename claude-skills -> agent-skills and de-brand

## Why

The example skills already use the SKILL.md format, which is now a cross-provider OPEN standard
(Anthropic's Agent Skills, adopted by Codex, Copilot, Cursor, Gemini CLI, JetBrains Junie, and
more) — so the format is the right portable bet and should be KEPT. What is Claude-locked is the
packaging: the directory name `examples/claude-skills/`, the README's "Claude Code" branding and
docs.claude.com link, some Claude-Code-specific phrasing ("the Task tool"), and internal
references to `CLAUDE.md`/`CLAUDE.local.md`. Generalizing these makes the examples usable as
illustrative material for any harness.

## What

Rename `examples/claude-skills/` → `examples/agent-skills/`. Update the README to de-brand:
state that SKILL.md is a cross-provider standard, note which harnesses read skills and from
where (paths differ per tool), and drop the Claude-only framing. Generalize Claude-Code-specific
orchestration phrasing to provider-neutral wording ("subagent" is fine; replace "the Task tool"
and similar). Repoint internal references from `CLAUDE.md`/`CLAUDE.local.md` to `AGENTS.md`.
Update the shared/ sync test (`tests/unit/test_skill_shared_sync.py`) and any code/docs that
reference the old path, so `make test` stays green. Keep each SKILL.md's `name`/`description`
frontmatter (the portable core).

## Scope

In: `examples/agent-skills/**`, `tests/unit/test_skill_shared_sync.py`, and any references to
the old dir path. Out: rewriting the skills' substantive logic. Depends on: the AGENTS.md story
(so the `CLAUDE.md → AGENTS.md` reference repoint targets the real new file).

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Directory renamed to `examples/agent-skills/`; no stale path references remain.
  - Proving: `rg -l 'examples/claude-skills' . | wc -l` == 0.
- [ ] README de-branded: no "Claude Code"-only framing; states SKILL.md portability and where
  each harness looks for skills.
  - Proving: reviewer confirms; `rg -c 'Claude Code' examples/agent-skills/README.md` reduced to
    only accurate, non-exclusive mentions.
- [ ] Skill bodies use provider-neutral phrasing and reference `AGENTS.md` (not `CLAUDE.md`).
  - Proving: `rg -c 'the Task tool|CLAUDE\.local\.md' examples/agent-skills/` == 0.
- [ ] `make lint && make test` pass (shared-sync test updated to the new path).
data.title: Generalize the example skills: rename claude-skills -> agent-skills and de-brand
